an5.125:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, there are these five things that reduce vitality. What five? One does what is harmful; one does not observe moderation in what is beneficial; one has poor digestion; one walks
at an improper time;
one is not celibate. These are the five things that reduce vitality.
an5.125:1.2:
2
"Bhikkhus, there are these five things that increase vitality. What five? One does what is beneficial; one observes moderation in what is beneficial; one has good digestion; one walks
at the proper time; one is celibate. These are the five things that increase vitality."
